sales.description:
Valentinian III, AD 425-455. Gold Solidus (4.4g) 20 mm. Minted at Ravenna. Diad. and cuirassed bust of the emperor to r. Reverse:  Emperor stg. on man-headed serpent holding Victory on globe and long cross R-V in field. S-4310. NGC Choice AU*, Strike: 5/5, Surface: 5/5. Boldly struck on a full flan with full legends and lustrous.  Estimated Value $750 - UP
Ex Peter Preovolos Collection....
